;; Flat lattice: ⊥ represented as 'bot, ⊤ as 'top, others as numbers
;; join: ⊥ ⊔ x = x; x ⊔ x = x; x ⊔ y = ⊤ if x≠y and both non-bot/non-top
(define (join a b)
  (cond ((eq? a 'bot) b)
        ((eq? b 'bot) a)
        ((eq? a 'top) 'top)
        ((eq? b 'top) 'top)
        ((equal? a b) a)
        (else 'top)))

(define (f x)
  (case x
    ((bot) 98)
    ((98) 29)
    ((29) 38)
    ((38) 5)
    ((5) 36)
    ((36) 69)
    ((69) 37)
    ((37) 22)
    ((22) 59)
    ((59) 73)
    ((73) 96)
    ((96) 99)
    (else x)))

;; Kleene iteration: x_{n+1} = x_n ⊔ f(x_n), starting from ⊥
(define (iterate x)
  (let ((next (join x (f x))))
    (display x) (display " -> ") (display next) (newline)
    (if (equal? next x) x (iterate next))))

(iterate 'bot)

(define (union a b) (lset-union equal? a b))
(define (inter a b) (lset-intersection equal? a b))

;; Innermost: {d} ∩ {a,d,f,g,h}
(define s1 (inter '(d) '(a d f g h)))
;; s1 ∪ {f}
(define s2 (union s1 '(f)))
;; {b,h} ∩ s2
(define s3 (inter '(b h) s2))
;; s3 ∪ {e}
(define s4 (union s3 '(e)))
;; {a,c,e,g} ∩ {b,d,e,g,h}
(define s5 (inter '(a c e g) '(b d e g h)))
;; final: s4 ∪ s5
(define final (union s4 s5))
(list s1 s2 s3 s4 s5 (sort final (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))

  (let loop ((b b) (acc a))
    (if (null? b) acc
        (loop (cdr b) (if (member (car b) acc) acc (cons (car b) acc))))))
(define (inter a b)

(define (my-filter p lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) '())
        ((p (car lst)) (cons (car lst) (my-filter p (cdr lst))))
        (else (my-filter p (cdr lst)))))
(define (union a b)
  (let loop ((b b) (acc a))
    (if (null? b) acc
        (loop (cdr b) (if (member (car b) acc) acc (cons (car b) acc))))))
(define (inter a b)
  (my-filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a))

(define C2 (I C1 '(f h i)))
(define C3 (U C2 '(b e f g i)))
(define C4 (U C3 '(d h)))
(define B2 (I B1 C4))
(define R (U A B2))
(sort R (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . xs) (apply lset-union eq? xs))
(define (I . xs) (apply lset-intersection eq? xs))
(define A '(a b c d e f h i j))
(define B '(a b c d e f g i j))
(define C '(a b c e f g h i))
(define D '(f j))
(define E '(b c e i j))
(define F '(b c d g h j))
(define G '(b e g h i j))
(define H '(d g h i j))
(define J '(c g h j))
(define result
  (U (I A B)
     (I (U (I C (U D E))
           (I F G))
        (U H J))))
(sort result (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (a b) (lset-union eq? b a)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (fold (lambda (a b) (lset-intersection eq? b a)) (car sets) (cdr sets)))
(define s1 (U '(d f h) '(a c d e f g h i j)))       ; {d,f,h} ∪ ...
(define s2 (I '(f) s1))                             ; {f} ∩ s1
(define s3 (I '(b c f h) s2))                       ; {b,c,f,h} ∩ s2
(define s4 (I '(a b d e f i j) s3))                 ; ∩ s3
(define s5 (U '(a b f g) s4))                       ; {a,b,f,g} ∪ s4
(define s6 (I '(a b c d e f g h i) '(a b c d e f g i j)))
(define s7 (U s6 s5))
(define s8 (I '(a e g h) '(d f g h)))
(define ans (I s8 s7))
(sort ans (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))

              (S #\a #\c #\d #\e #\f #\g #\h #\i #\j #\k #\n)))
(define L2 (U L1 (S #\b)))
(define L3 (U L2 (S #\a #\b #\c #\d #\f #\h #\i #\j #\k #\l #\m #\n)))

;; Right side
;; First part: (({d,g,l,m} ∪ {b,h,j,m}) ∪ ({d,h,j} ∪ {c,f,g}))
(define R1 (U (U (S #\d #\g #\l #\m) (S #\b #\h #\j #\m))
              (U (S #\d #\h #\j) (S #\c #\f #\g))))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (reduce (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (sort-set s) (sort s (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))))

(define A (I '(a b c d g h j k l n o) (I '(b e f g h j k l n o) '(a b c e f h i j l m n p))))
(define B (U '(a f g k l) '(b i j k o)))
(define left (I A B))

(define C (U '(a b c e f g h i j k l n o p) '(f g h l m)))
(define D (U '(b d h i j k l m n) '(a b c h n o p)))
(define E1 (I '(a b c d e f g h i j l n o p) (U '(c g l) '(a b d e f g h j k m n o p))))
(define F1 (I '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n o p) (U (I '(h i j) '(d n)) '(a c d e f i l n o p))))
(define G1 (I E1 F1))
(define H1 (U D G1))
(define I1 (U C H1))
(define right (U I1 '(g o)))

(define result (U left right))
(sort-set result)

(define (mysort lst lt)
  (if (or (null? lst) (null? (cdr lst))) lst
      (let* ((pivot (car lst)) (rest (cdr lst))
             (less (filter (lambda (x) (lt x pivot)) rest))
             (more (filter (lambda (x) (not (lt x pivot))) rest)))
        (append (mysort less lt) (list pivot) (mysort more lt)))))
(mysort result (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))

  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according

  Returns: list

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(define (sym<? a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))
(define (dedup lst) (if (null? lst) '() (if (member (car lst) (cdr lst)) (dedup (cdr lst)) (cons (car lst) (dedup (cdr lst))))))
(define (U a b) (sort sym<? (dedup (append a b))))
(define (I a b) (sort sym<? (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a)))
(define result
  (U
    (I
      (U '(a d e f h m n o) (U '(f g l m p) '(c d g h i j k m n o p)))
      (I
        (U
          (U '(a b c f g h i j l n o p)
             (U (I '(a b c d e f g h i j l m n o p) '(a b c d e g i k l m n o))
                '(b d e i n o p)))
          (I '(a d e f h i j k l m n o p) '(a b e f g h i j k n o p)))
        (I (U '(h j k l m o) '(a c d e f g h j k l n)) '(b c f g h i m n p))))
    (U
      (U '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(c g h i l m o p))
      (I (U '(a b c f g i l p) '(d f))
         (I '(a b e f h k m n p)
            (U '(a b c d e g h i k m n o p)
               (I (I '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(g n)) '(a f i m))))))))
result

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I a b) (lset-intersection eq? a b))
(define (sort-syms s) (list-sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) (delete-duplicates s eq?)))

;; Build the expression
(define A '(a c d g h i j l m n o))
(define B '(a b d e f g h j l m n))
(define C1 (U '(a c e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(c j o)))
(define C2 (I C1 '(c e g k p)))
(define D (U B C2))
(define E (I A D))
(define F (U E '(b f j)))

(define G1 '(a b c d e f g i l n o p))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(display (sort-set LEFT)) (newline)
;; L2 = {b c e m p} ∩ {d g h n c e f g j n p} = {c e p}? Let's see

;; L1 huge, ∩ {c e p} -> need c,e,p in L1
